prompt.content:
Can you use the Greenhouse tool to extract the relevant data and determine the requisition_id of the Job with the lowest Pipeline Coverage Ratio? 

Pipeline Coverage Ratio of a Job is Pipeline Count of the Job divided by Target Pipeline Count of the Job. Pipeline Count of the Job is the count of applications for that Job with a status other than rejected.

Refer to the Job_Pipeline_Targets.csv in the filesystem for the target pipeline count. Use only open jobs for this analysis. In case of a tie, state the oldest job based on the opened_at.

For the job with the lowest pipeline coverage ratio, create a live internal only posting and share the details in the console. Please also provide a full report of your analysis in the console.

rubrics.name: States that the Job ID with the lowest Pipeline Coverage Ratio is Job ID 198. (ver_8e2151b7e13646fdb1cf76283de7d19c)
